reviews.review_description:
I'm a fan of Totally Baseball, so I excited to see Totally Basketball release.  The game has some fun elements, HORSE mode, being able to dunk is awesome. Being able to run, pass and shoot freely is a great mark to hit. 

Unfortunately though, the game falls short for me with the ball handling. Even with automatic dribbling, by the time you get your hand in the right spot for the automatic dribbling to take over, an opponent has already stolen the ball.  If you steal the ball, and it bounces on the ground, trying to get it back into a dribbling rhythm is tough, and the ball will most likely get stolen before you can sort things out. Or you may hit it by accident and send it flying through the air.

I think ball handling in basketball is really tough to implement in VR since you can actually feel the ball, and the field of view on the Quest isn't wide enough to have real peripheral vision to anticipate steals.

Baseball worked a lot better since baseball is inherently a sort of turn-based game and typically do things one at a time. Throw a pitch, get ready to catch and possibly throw again. Or batting. Basketball has so much more simultaneous action going on and I think Totally Basketball gives the player too much to deal with, more than the VR platform currently allows.

On a side note, I had to crank up the assist as otherwise it felt like I was throwing a bowling ball.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the input and breakdown, we will def be sharing this with the dev team

developer_response.body:
[3-14]
We're sorry to hear that you are having trouble with the game. There is an option within the game for automatic dribbling that will help you to dribble without needing to think about the technique needed for manual dribbling.
The login issue seems to be an OS issue as it cropped up without us making any changes to the game. It is on Meta's radar and will hopefully be fixed in their next firmware update.
We are actively seeking out fixes to issues in our games. Join our discord to better report findings provide feedback. You can also better coordinate multiplayer sessions with other players from our discord.

reviews.review_description: This game is in its early years so I don't expect it to be perfect. Some parts are very solid like the shooting and their are very rarely performance bugs. I have some notes though, work on first of all the difficulty,  very easy to the point I could just stand around and grab the ball in the passing lane from any of the AI. The game Atmosphere options are limited to a college stadium with an inactive audience, its not vital but it would be cool if the audience was more reactive. Dribbling is weird but its impossible to make that good in a VR game. I do believe this game can become the "2K" of VR over time, but for now I can only give it 3 stars. Looking forward to seeing improvement!

developer_response.body:
We really appreciate your feedback and honesty. You're right, we are still early in development, and we're constantly working to improve.  We're glad you've found the shooting solid and appreciate you noting the lack of performance bugs – that's something we prioritize.
Dribbling is a tough nut to crack in VR, and we're exploring different control schemes and mechanics to try and make it feel more intuitive and responsive.  Speaking of, we just pushed an update yesterday and curious if this fixes any issues with dribbling? 

As for the Atmosphere and difficulty, there are instances that hype the crowd when scoring or dunking, and our team difficulty is more challenging with the next team you play against. 

Thanks for the vote of confidence and the 3-star rating.  We're committed to making this the "2K" of VR, and feedback like yours is invaluable in helping us get there. We'll keep pushing updates and improvements, so we hope you'll stick with us and see the progress!

reviews.review_description:
Just bought it. The court foot sound effects, the ball sound effects, having AI Teamates and the hoops nets having physics(something not done in other games), everything awesome, Just few things
a. It's kind of hard to dribble in place(manual) the ball keeps slipping away.
b. It's even harder dribbling while walk run.  I'm saying because if you start moving with locomotion stick it Immediately kicks the ball away, so it's impossible to dribble while run-walk. And many times instead of walking even if you push the stick forward slightly it just moves too fast forward, it's not gradual acceleration so sometimes walking is impossible.
All the other things are great. It's a great game. Wish there were more street basketball type environments that are not GYMS-College-NBA style but just basketball court in the street. I'm not sure if there is.

developer_response.body: We do have 1 street court! But would love to bring more. Thank you for your review and we will review our dribbling while run-walk.

reviews.review_description: It's really good to practice your flick of your wrist

developer_response.body: Hey thanks so much for the great review and for loving our game :) Other games make the shooting be on rails so it doesn't really matter how you throw the ball, our shooting can feel tougher but that's just because it's more realistic! We did add assist modes for pros and people just starting out

reviews.review_description: Best game ever. Only things that I think should be added is difficulty of stealing and blocking. Both are way too easy and the cpu takes too long to shoot or dribble. They also need to add a different courts. Teammates also need to be able to catch passes better they can’t catch it when I throw it straight to them.but overall great game

developer_response.body:
We appreciate your feedback on the difficulty of stealing and blocking. We'll definitely consider adjusting these mechanics in future updates to provide a more challenging and strategic experience. We're actually working on improving the AI's responsiveness and decision-making. 
Courts will need to be designed and constructed, those will take more time, but dont fret more is to come! Thank you for your Review.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed the single-player modes. We're sorry to hear about your experience with the multiplayer mode. Keep in mind we are a newish basketball game and more players are soon to come. Join our discord where we are almost at 200 members. Check the channels and post looking for game.

developer_response.body:
[2-06]
Just informing you that we have push another build with more fixes and improvements. Just curious if you had a chance to look at that?

[12-30]
Hello kingbob.957015, We have made more improvements to the Dribbling and Shooting in the game. We hope you are able to check out the MP mode, with Verses and Freeroam for you and your Friends. Since the AI are being worked on in next update!

[11-22]
Another Update to the Totally Basketball Game. 

Hey kingbob we've taken your feedback into consideration and released an update with the AI NOT stuck in base of goal and reworked the Shooting Assists.  Please check it out and let us know if this improves your experience!

[11-1]
Hello kingbob.957015,
We are excited that you were able to check out our Second Game Totally Basketball. Which is a brand new game and only has the two styles of locomotion's. We have thought about Arm-swing BUT came to the issue of dribbling using arm-swing or playing defense using arm-swing locomotion. Just doesnt work. 
Update: Oculus has a Deadzone that you can set it there if you have any issues when walking in-game. 

As for the shooting assist [which we have an update coming soon that helps with that.] 
Have you tried any other Assist Low, Medium, or NONE?

reviews.review_description:
Let me start this off by saying i love zevo games, totally baseball is probably one of my most played games, but this is not good.
The throwing physics feel unnatural and scripted, you have to shoot with one hand if you dont want it to be awkward and it just feels like the baseball throwing physics.
Ai are inept, its dead easy to steal the ball and it takes them 10 years to shoot.
The gameplay loop gets boring after about 5 minutes.
Let me say this may be worth it though, zevo games could pull through and fix the problems, and this game could be fun in multiplayer, even though the shooting and passing is pretty broken.

its worth buying just for the multiplayer, and the updates that will eventually come.

developer_response.body:
[2-06] 
We hear your feedback in the Baseball server. but have you checked out this Basketball build with multiple fixes and improvements?

[12-31]
New Year is coming, we have pushed new builds with improvements to the Dribbling and the Shooting. If you could provide feedback there; after maybe playing a much harder team. 
The Possums are the easiest team, so stealing would be easy, aswell as they are slower. 
-also- 
Dont shoot with both hands gripped on the ball, 2nd hand irl is only for support of keeping the ball straight. No Need in VR when ball is already gripped. 
Only pass with 2 or 1 hand. 

[11-22]
We just released an update that makes the AI more aggressive and they now actively steal.  Please update to the latest version and check it out.

[9-19]
It sounds like you might be trying to shoot the ball by throwing it instead of flicking your wrist to get that natural arc when shooting. You can utilize the Practice mode to play around with different shooting methods and easily swap between the different assist levels to see if one might feel more right for you. For passing, try doing a two handed pass as mentioned in the tutorial.

I'm sorry to hear that you feel the game is slow and boring. The first opponent is intentionally designed to be slower and make more mistakes as they are our easiest team. Our teams get progressively harder and faster as you progress through the game. In Horse you can jump straight to the hardest opponent.

Keep a look out for future updates as we fix bugs, improve features, and add new features.

reviews.review_description: The controls are the dumbest of any vr game I’ve ever played. And I own hundreds of them. How do you not have smooth turning??? It’s 2024 What were you thinking?? also the dribble function is so bad I couldn’t even pass the ball from one hand to the other. Don’t get me started on the movement being backwards when you have snap turning turned on. Has no one from your company played a vr game before. The non dominate hand should be used for turning!!!! The shooting function is exactly what you would expect from this game… bad. I feel bad writing this review but I feel like I have too for other people thinking this would be anything like the other vr basketball games on meta store. I gave it less than twenty minutes before giving up. So I guess keep that in mind when using this review as a reason not to buy it. Maybe it gets better after 25 minutes lol idk.

developer_response.body:
[2-06]
Just informing you we have pushed a new update to Basketball build that improves alot of your key issues. 
Feel free to enjoy 20 mins or less and let us know your New Review! Thanks!

[Dec-31]
Hello acanz90, We have made improvements to the Dribbling and Shooting in the game for this update that is out now. We hope you are able to check out the MP mode, with Verses and Freeroam for you and your Friends. Since the AI are being worked on in next update!

[AI update, coming soon. If you havent checked out our other VR game. Totally Baseball. Join our discord if you are interested about both VR games.)

[11-22]
Acanz30, Check out our latest Update. Feel free to write another review, as we are looking to help the community, or you can join our Discord where we can help you with any issues like controls in VR. Shooting assist has had a complete rework to give a better experience and the AI are more aggressive and now actively steal. [Thanks for your feedback, dribbling will soon be worked on]

[10-5]
Thank you, acanz90 for the feedback. We will take your suggestions into consideration. Our Dribbling and Shooting are designed to use realistic physics and not faked animations like other games. You can play in Practice Mode to get a better feel for them. We felt there was no need for smooth locomotion due to it being a VR game and the ability to turn your person or head. This is the most natural turning you can get. Keep an eye out for our updates as we further improve our features and implement player suggestions.

reviews.review_description: As someone who has owned Totally Baseball for several years. Seeing them release a basketball game was pretty intriguing. This game honestly reminded me of Wii Sports Resort Basketball. And I think that would pretty much sum up the game. Sadly there are a lot of problems.. the dribbling for one is really bad.. you can only dribble perfectly while walking, if you sprint you'll lose that ball immediately. Shooting is another huge issue, you are only allowed to shoot with one hand. And that wouldn't be so bad if there wasn't people like me who like to use their second hand to support their shot, like actual basketball players. But the ball would fling immediately.. and I feel like the ball isn't weighted enough. It feels like I have to use less force to shoot every time. Having that many issues with shooting and dribbling shouldn't be a thing. It's lit 99% of basketball. NPCs are designed well, except the fact that they get stuck sometimes on the basketball net polls and you have to move them yourselves.. if you even can. If all of these get fixed, then I and I think many others would consider this the best Basketball VR Game.

reviews.review_description: Flat out: this game rules. It’s a ton of fun and has tons of potential down the line. However, the game is filled with bugs. The biggest being that if you play a versus game in single player, there is probably a 50% chance you are able to finish the game because of bugs. The biggest being players getting stuck around the goal, unable to move, or inbound the ball. And with the clock stopped, this softlocks the game. I ran into another issue just today where I was fouled, and my teammate just wouldn’t inbound the ball. He just stood there. I had a teammate also get stuck under the goal for the entire first half until the game reset characters and he was free. This game will be the definitive basketball game on quest once these are fixed. The game is a blast but these issues make it super hard to enjoy fully. There’s also other small issues, like the ball physics being a bit iffy when I grab the ball while sprinting, the ball seems to want to keep the momentum it had before and will shoot out of my hand if I let it go. And sometimes when I shoot, the ball just drops to the ground. Other than that I love the game!

developer_response.body:

Thank you, for the comment and the review. 
Thank you for the suggestion. Free throws are in the game.. your are just not fouling enough! We will look into these.

reviews.review_description: I love being able to jump higher than I ever could in real life. It makes me feel like a real basketball player. I can play this game all day without triggering my asthma as would happen playing real basketball. Great game!

developer_response.body: That's what we aim for in our full Basketball Game. It's great to hear that the game provides a fun and accessible way to experience the thrill of basketball without the physical limitations. We'll continue to work hard to bring you even more exciting features and improvements. Thanks for your Review.

reviews.review_description: Amazing overall super fun, not hard to get the hang of. Dribbling is still a little weird and so is the passing but overall amazing. If you could add like an elimination or tournament in the single player mode I think that would be really fun as well as more teams.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We're delighted to hear you're enjoying the game and that you find it easy to pick up and play. We appreciate your feedback on the dribbling and passing mechanics, and we'll definitely look into making improvements. The idea of adding an elimination or tournament mode in single-player sounds fantastic, and we'll pass it to the design team. Thank you for your support and great suggestions.

reviews.review_description: The game is great like Very great￼. But it doesn’t have a buzzer beaters￼ Whenever I play￼.also The height of my team mates and enemies in the games our Short￼￼.￼￼but I like the game and it good.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, mikedezzy. We're glad you're enjoying the game. We're actively working on improving the games experience, and curious if recalibrating your height when first jumping into Totally Basketball if that will fix your AI issue being shorter than you.
 As for the Buzzer beater we are improving the games rules of basketball and that consist of fouls and game play like buzzer beaters.

reviews.review_description: my friend in America told me to buy this so we can hangout and shoot hoops. Shooting in other games feels too fake and easy but i really like how real the physics in this game are!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! We're thrilled to hear you are enjoying the realistic physics and the social aspect of the game. It's always fun to hear how players are using our game to connect with friends around the world.
